mapper.select:
/* ProdSaleDayStoreBensonMapper.getProdSaleDayStoreBensonList */
SELECT
TO_CHAR(TO_DATE(tsdps.SALE_DATE, 'yyyymmdd'), 'yyyy-mm-dd') AS SALE_DATE,
TO_CHAR(TO_DATE(#{startDate}, 'yyyymmdd'), 'yyyy-mm-dd') AS DAY_FROM, TO_CHAR(TO_DATE(#{endDate}, 'yyyymmdd'), 'yyyy-mm-dd') AS DAY_TO,
tsdps.STORE_CD, tms.STORE_NM, tmp.PROD_NM, SUM(tsdps.TOT_SALE_QTY) AS SALE_QTY1, SUM(tsdps.TOT_SALE_AMT) AS TOT_SALE_AMT1, SUM(tsdps.REAL_SALE_AMT) AS REAL_SALE_AMT1, SUM(tsdps.GEN_TOT_SALE_QTY) AS GEN_SALE_QTY, SUM(tsdps.GEN_TOT_SALE_AMT) AS GEN_TOT_SALE_AMT, SUM(tsdps.GEN_REAL_SALE_AMT) AS GEN_REAL_SALE_AMT, SUM(tsdps.DLVR_TOT_SALE_QTY) AS DLVR_SALE_QTY, SUM(tsdps.DLVR_TOT_SALE_AMT) AS DLVR_TOT_SALE_AMT, SUM(tsdps.DLVR_REAL_SALE_AMT) AS DLVR_REAL_SALE_AMT, SUM(tsdps.PACK_TOT_SALE_QTY) AS PACK_SALE_QTY, SUM(tsdps.PACK_TOT_SALE_AMT) AS PACK_TOT_SALE_AMT, SUM(tsdps.PACK_REAL_SALE_AMT) AS PACK_REAL_SALE_AMT
FROM ( SELECT v4.SALE_DATE, v4.STORE_CD, v4.PROD_CD, SUM(v4.TOT_SALE_QTY) AS TOT_SALE_QTY, SUM(v4.TOT_SALE_AMT) AS TOT_SALE_AMT, SUM(v4.REAL_SALE_AMT) AS REAL_SALE_AMT, SUM(CASE WHEN v4.DLVR_ORDER_FG = '1' THEN v4.TOT_SALE_QTY ELSE 0 END) AS GEN_TOT_SALE_QTY, SUM(CASE WHEN v4.DLVR_ORDER_FG = '1' THEN v4.TOT_SALE_AMT ELSE 0 END) AS GEN_TOT_SALE_AMT, SUM(CASE WHEN v4.DLVR_ORDER_FG = '1' THEN v4.REAL_SALE_AMT ELSE 0 END) AS GEN_REAL_SALE_AMT, SUM(CASE WHEN v4.DLVR_ORDER_FG = '2' THEN v4.TOT_SALE_QTY ELSE 0 END) AS DLVR_TOT_SALE_QTY, SUM(CASE WHEN v4.DLVR_ORDER_FG = '2' THEN v4.TOT_SALE_AMT ELSE 0 END) AS DLVR_TOT_SALE_AMT, SUM(CASE WHEN v4.DLVR_ORDER_FG = '2' THEN v4.REAL_SALE_AMT ELSE 0 END) AS DLVR_REAL_SALE_AMT, SUM(CASE WHEN (v4.DLVR_ORDER_FG = '3' OR v4.DLVR_ORDER_FG = '4') THEN v4.TOT_SALE_QTY ELSE 0 END) AS PACK_TOT_SALE_QTY, SUM(CASE WHEN (v4.DLVR_ORDER_FG = '3' OR v4.DLVR_ORDER_FG = '4') THEN v4.TOT_SALE_AMT ELSE 0 END) AS PACK_TOT_SALE_AMT, SUM(CASE WHEN (v4.DLVR_ORDER_FG = '3' OR v4.DLVR_ORDER_FG = '4') THEN v4.REAL_SALE_AMT ELSE 0 END) AS PACK_REAL_SALE_AMT FROM TB_SL_DAILY_PROD_SDSEL_DLVR_MOMS_V04 v4 WHERE 1=1 AND v4.HQ_OFFICE_CD = #{hqOfficeCd} AND v4.SALE_DATE BETWEEN #{startDate} AND #{endDate}
AND v4.STORE_CD IN (${storeCdQuery})
AND v4.PROD_CD IN (${prodCdQuery})
GROUP BY v4.SALE_DATE, v4.STORE_CD, v4.PROD_CD ) tsdps, TB_MS_STORE tms, TB_MS_STORE_INFO tmsi, TB_MS_PRODUCT tmp WHERE 1=1
AND tms.HQ_BRAND_CD = #{storeHqBrandCd} -- 매장브랜드 선택일때
-- 매장브랜드 전체일때 AND tms.HQ_BRAND_CD IN
#{item}
AND tmp.PROD_CLASS_CD IN
#{item}
AND tmp.PROD_CD LIKE '%'||#{prodCd}||'%'
AND tmp.PROD_NM LIKE '%'||#{prodNm}||'%'
AND tmp.HQ_BRAND_CD = #{prodHqBrandCd} -- 상품브랜드 선택일때
-- 상품브랜드 전체일때 AND tmp.HQ_BRAND_CD IN
#{item}
AND tms.STORE_CD = tsdps.STORE_CD AND tmsi.STORE_CD (+)= tms.STORE_CD AND tmp.STORE_CD = tsdps.STORE_CD AND tmp.PROD_CD = tsdps.PROD_CD
GROUP BY tsdps.SALE_DATE, tsdps.STORE_CD, tms.STORE_NM, tsdps.PROD_CD, tmp.PROD_NM ORDER BY tsdps.SALE_DATE, tsdps.STORE_CD, tsdps.PROD_CD
GROUP BY tsdps.STORE_CD, tms.STORE_NM, tsdps.PROD_CD, tmp.PROD_NM ORDER BY tsdps.STORE_CD, tsdps.PROD_CD

/* ProdSaleDayStoreBensonMapper.getProdSaleDayStoreBensonExcelList */ SELECT
TO_CHAR(TO_DATE(tsdps.SALE_DATE, 'yyyymmdd'), 'yyyy-mm-dd') AS SALE_DATE,
TO_CHAR(TO_DATE(#{startDate}, 'yyyymmdd'), 'yyyy-mm-dd') AS DAY_FROM, TO_CHAR(TO_DATE(#{endDate}, 'yyyymmdd'), 'yyyy-mm-dd') AS DAY_TO,
tsdps.STORE_CD, tms.STORE_NM, tmp.PROD_NM, SUM(tsdps.TOT_SALE_QTY) AS SALE_QTY1, SUM(tsdps.TOT_SALE_AMT) AS TOT_SALE_AMT1, SUM(tsdps.REAL_SALE_AMT) AS REAL_SALE_AMT1, SUM(tsdps.GEN_TOT_SALE_QTY) AS GEN_SALE_QTY, SUM(tsdps.GEN_TOT_SALE_AMT) AS GEN_TOT_SALE_AMT, SUM(tsdps.GEN_REAL_SALE_AMT) AS GEN_REAL_SALE_AMT, SUM(tsdps.DLVR_TOT_SALE_QTY) AS DLVR_SALE_QTY, SUM(tsdps.DLVR_TOT_SALE_AMT) AS DLVR_TOT_SALE_AMT, SUM(tsdps.DLVR_REAL_SALE_AMT) AS DLVR_REAL_SALE_AMT, SUM(tsdps.PACK_TOT_SALE_QTY) AS PACK_SALE_QTY, SUM(tsdps.PACK_TOT_SALE_AMT) AS PACK_TOT_SALE_AMT, SUM(tsdps.PACK_REAL_SALE_AMT) AS PACK_REAL_SALE_AMT FROM ( SELECT v4.SALE_DATE, v4.STORE_CD, v4.PROD_CD, SUM(v4.TOT_SALE_QTY) AS TOT_SALE_QTY, SUM(v4.TOT_SALE_AMT) AS TOT_SALE_AMT, SUM(v4.REAL_SALE_AMT) AS REAL_SALE_AMT, SUM(CASE WHEN v4.DLVR_ORDER_FG = '1' THEN v4.TOT_SALE_QTY ELSE 0 END) AS GEN_TOT_SALE_QTY, SUM(CASE WHEN v4.DLVR_ORDER_FG = '1' THEN v4.TOT_SALE_AMT ELSE 0 END) AS GEN_TOT_SALE_AMT, SUM(CASE WHEN v4.DLVR_ORDER_FG = '1' THEN v4.REAL_SALE_AMT ELSE 0 END) AS GEN_REAL_SALE_AMT, SUM(CASE WHEN v4.DLVR_ORDER_FG = '2' THEN v4.TOT_SALE_QTY ELSE 0 END) AS DLVR_TOT_SALE_QTY, SUM(CASE WHEN v4.DLVR_ORDER_FG = '2' THEN v4.TOT_SALE_AMT ELSE 0 END) AS DLVR_TOT_SALE_AMT, SUM(CASE WHEN v4.DLVR_ORDER_FG = '2' THEN v4.REAL_SALE_AMT ELSE 0 END) AS DLVR_REAL_SALE_AMT, SUM(CASE WHEN (v4.DLVR_ORDER_FG = '3' OR v4.DLVR_ORDER_FG = '4') THEN v4.TOT_SALE_QTY ELSE 0 END) AS PACK_TOT_SALE_QTY, SUM(CASE WHEN (v4.DLVR_ORDER_FG = '3' OR v4.DLVR_ORDER_FG = '4') THEN v4.TOT_SALE_AMT ELSE 0 END) AS PACK_TOT_SALE_AMT, SUM(CASE WHEN (v4.DLVR_ORDER_FG = '3' OR v4.DLVR_ORDER_FG = '4') THEN v4.REAL_SALE_AMT ELSE 0 END) AS PACK_REAL_SALE_AMT FROM TB_SL_DAILY_PROD_SDSEL_DLVR_MOMS_V04 v4 WHERE 1=1 AND v4.HQ_OFFICE_CD = #{hqOfficeCd} AND v4.SALE_DATE BETWEEN #{startDate} AND #{endDate}
AND v4.STORE_CD IN (${storeCdQuery})
AND v4.PROD_CD IN (${prodCdQuery})
GROUP BY v4.SALE_DATE, v4.STORE_CD, v4.PROD_CD ) tsdps, TB_MS_STORE tms, TB_MS_STORE_INFO tmsi, TB_MS_PRODUCT tmp WHERE 1=1
AND tms.HQ_BRAND_CD = #{storeHqBrandCd} -- 매장브랜드 선택일때
-- 매장브랜드 전체일때 AND tms.HQ_BRAND_CD IN
#{item}
AND tmp.PROD_CLASS_CD IN
#{item}
AND tmp.PROD_CD LIKE '%'||#{prodCd}||'%'
AND tmp.PROD_NM LIKE '%'||#{prodNm}||'%'
AND tmp.HQ_BRAND_CD = #{prodHqBrandCd} -- 상품브랜드 선택일때
-- 상품브랜드 전체일때 AND tmp.HQ_BRAND_CD IN
#{item}
AND tms.STORE_CD = tsdps.STORE_CD AND tmsi.STORE_CD (+)= tms.STORE_CD AND tmp.STORE_CD = tsdps.STORE_CD AND tmp.PROD_CD = tsdps.PROD_CD
GROUP BY tsdps.SALE_DATE, tsdps.STORE_CD, tms.STORE_NM, tsdps.PROD_CD, tmp.PROD_NM ORDER BY tsdps.SALE_DATE, tsdps.STORE_CD, tsdps.PROD_CD
GROUP BY tsdps.STORE_CD, tms.STORE_NM, tsdps.PROD_CD, tmp.PROD_NM ORDER BY tsdps.STORE_CD, tsdps.PROD_CD

/* ProdSaleDayStoreBensonMapper.getProdSaleDayStoreBensonExcelDivisionList */
SELECT
TO_CHAR(TO_DATE(tsdps.SALE_DATE, 'yyyymmdd'), 'yyyy-mm-dd') AS SALE_DATE,
TO_CHAR(TO_DATE(#{startDate}, 'yyyymmdd'), 'yyyy-mm-dd') AS DAY_FROM, TO_CHAR(TO_DATE(#{endDate}, 'yyyymmdd'), 'yyyy-mm-dd') AS DAY_TO,
tsdps.STORE_CD, tms.STORE_NM, tmp.PROD_NM, SUM(tsdps.TOT_SALE_QTY) AS SALE_QTY1, SUM(tsdps.TOT_SALE_AMT) AS TOT_SALE_AMT1, SUM(tsdps.REAL_SALE_AMT) AS REAL_SALE_AMT1, SUM(tsdps.GEN_TOT_SALE_QTY) AS GEN_SALE_QTY, SUM(tsdps.GEN_TOT_SALE_AMT) AS GEN_TOT_SALE_AMT, SUM(tsdps.GEN_REAL_SALE_AMT) AS GEN_REAL_SALE_AMT, SUM(tsdps.DLVR_TOT_SALE_QTY) AS DLVR_SALE_QTY, SUM(tsdps.DLVR_TOT_SALE_AMT) AS DLVR_TOT_SALE_AMT, SUM(tsdps.DLVR_REAL_SALE_AMT) AS DLVR_REAL_SALE_AMT, SUM(tsdps.PACK_TOT_SALE_QTY) AS PACK_SALE_QTY, SUM(tsdps.PACK_TOT_SALE_AMT) AS PACK_TOT_SALE_AMT, SUM(tsdps.PACK_REAL_SALE_AMT) AS PACK_REAL_SALE_AMT FROM ( SELECT v4.SALE_DATE, v4.STORE_CD, v4.PROD_CD, SUM(v4.TOT_SALE_QTY) AS TOT_SALE_QTY, SUM(v4.TOT_SALE_AMT) AS TOT_SALE_AMT, SUM(v4.REAL_SALE_AMT) AS REAL_SALE_AMT, SUM(CASE WHEN v4.DLVR_ORDER_FG = '1' THEN v4.TOT_SALE_QTY ELSE 0 END) AS GEN_TOT_SALE_QTY, SUM(CASE WHEN v4.DLVR_ORDER_FG = '1' THEN v4.TOT_SALE_AMT ELSE 0 END) AS GEN_TOT_SALE_AMT, SUM(CASE WHEN v4.DLVR_ORDER_FG = '1' THEN v4.REAL_SALE_AMT ELSE 0 END) AS GEN_REAL_SALE_AMT, SUM(CASE WHEN v4.DLVR_ORDER_FG = '2' THEN v4.TOT_SALE_QTY ELSE 0 END) AS DLVR_TOT_SALE_QTY, SUM(CASE WHEN v4.DLVR_ORDER_FG = '2' THEN v4.TOT_SALE_AMT ELSE 0 END) AS DLVR_TOT_SALE_AMT, SUM(CASE WHEN v4.DLVR_ORDER_FG = '2' THEN v4.REAL_SALE_AMT ELSE 0 END) AS DLVR_REAL_SALE_AMT, SUM(CASE WHEN (v4.DLVR_ORDER_FG = '3' OR v4.DLVR_ORDER_FG = '4') THEN v4.TOT_SALE_QTY ELSE 0 END) AS PACK_TOT_SALE_QTY, SUM(CASE WHEN (v4.DLVR_ORDER_FG = '3' OR v4.DLVR_ORDER_FG = '4') THEN v4.TOT_SALE_AMT ELSE 0 END) AS PACK_TOT_SALE_AMT, SUM(CASE WHEN (v4.DLVR_ORDER_FG = '3' OR v4.DLVR_ORDER_FG = '4') THEN v4.REAL_SALE_AMT ELSE 0 END) AS PACK_REAL_SALE_AMT FROM TB_SL_DAILY_PROD_SDSEL_DLVR_MOMS_V04 v4 WHERE 1=1 AND v4.HQ_OFFICE_CD = #{hqOfficeCd} AND v4.SALE_DATE BETWEEN #{startDate} AND #{endDate}
AND v4.STORE_CD IN (${storeCdQuery})
AND v4.PROD_CD IN (${prodCdQuery})
GROUP BY v4.SALE_DATE, v4.STORE_CD, v4.PROD_CD ) tsdps, TB_MS_STORE tms, TB_MS_STORE_INFO tmsi, TB_MS_PRODUCT tmp WHERE 1=1
AND tms.HQ_BRAND_CD = #{storeHqBrandCd} -- 매장브랜드 선택일때
-- 매장브랜드 전체일때 AND tms.HQ_BRAND_CD IN
#{item}
AND tmp.PROD_CLASS_CD IN
#{item}
AND tmp.PROD_CD LIKE '%'||#{prodCd}||'%'
AND tmp.PROD_NM LIKE '%'||#{prodNm}||'%'
AND tmp.HQ_BRAND_CD = #{prodHqBrandCd} -- 상품브랜드 선택일때
-- 상품브랜드 전체일때 AND tmp.HQ_BRAND_CD IN
#{item}
AND tms.STORE_CD = tsdps.STORE_CD AND tmsi.STORE_CD (+)= tms.STORE_CD AND tmp.STORE_CD = tsdps.STORE_CD AND tmp.PROD_CD = tsdps.PROD_CD
GROUP BY tsdps.SALE_DATE, tsdps.STORE_CD, tms.STORE_NM, tsdps.PROD_CD, tmp.PROD_NM ORDER BY tsdps.SALE_DATE, tsdps.STORE_CD, tsdps.PROD_CD
GROUP BY tsdps.STORE_CD, tms.STORE_NM, tsdps.PROD_CD, tmp.PROD_NM ORDER BY tsdps.STORE_CD, tsdps.PROD_CD
mapper.insert: /* ProdSaleDayStoreBensonMapper.getDivisionExcelDownloadSaveInsert */ INSERT INTO TB_CM_DOWNLOAD_LIMIT_CHECK ( ORGN_CD, SEQ, PROC_DT, USER_ID, DOWNLOAD_FG, RESRCE_CD, RESRCE_NM, DOWNLOAD_USE_FG, DOWNLOAD_START_DT, DOWNLOAD_FILE_COUNT, DOWNLOAD_EXPECTED_END_DT, REG_DT, REG_ID, MOD_DT, MOD_ID, DOWNLOAD_DT ) VALUES ( #{orgnCd}, #{seq}, #{regDt}, #{userId}, #{downloadFg}, #{resrceCd}, #{resrceNm}, #{downloadUseFg}, #{regDt}, #{downloadFileCount}, #{downloadExpectedEndDt}, #{regDt}, #{regId}, #{modDt}, #{modId}, #{regDt} )
